name: Idaho rules different for work infection breathing issues?

mainEntity.name: Idaho rules different for work infection breathing issues?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Similar workers' comp, but file with Industrial Commission; 1-year notice.**

Covers exposures like infections; prove nexus[10][2].

- 60 days employer notice.
- Medical causation.
- No-fault benefits.

Check state specifics; lawyer knows variances. Standard process[10].
